settings_codex_subtitle: Configure app-wide AI defaults, fixed provider connections, and instruction files.
settings_codex_path_help: Leave empty to use system PATH resolution.
settings_codex_args_help: Extra flags passed before app-server arguments.
settings_codex_shared_help: These settings apply to shared Codex app-server used across all connected workspaces.
settings_codex_unsupported_flags_help: Per-thread override processing ignores unsupported flags: -m/--model, -a/--ask-for-approval, -s/--sandbox, --full-auto, --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox, --oss, --local-provider, and --no-alt-screen.
settings_codex_default_model_add_workspa: Add a workspace to load available models.
settings_codex_default_model_help: Sourced from first workspace and used when there is no thread-specific override.
settings_codex_reasoning_effort_help: Available options depend on selected model.
settings_codex_reasoning_effort_unavaila: Selected model does not expose reasoning effort options.
settings_codex_access_mode_help: Used when there is no thread-specific override.
settings_codex_review_mode_help: Choose whether /review runs in current thread or detached review thread.
settings_server_subtitle_mobile: Configure TCP host and token from desktop setup, then run a connection test.
settings_server_subtitle_desktop: Configure how Agent Monitor exposes TCP backend access for mobile and remote clients. Desktop usage stays local unless you explicitly enable remote mode.
settings_server_backend_mode_help: Local keeps desktop requests in-process. Remote routes desktop requests through same TCP transport path used by mobile clients.
settings_server_saved_remotes_help: Switch active remote here. Fields below edit active entry.
settings_server_keep_daemon_running_titl: Keep daemon running after app closes
settings_server_keep_daemon_running_subt: Leave mobile access daemon running when Agent Monitor closes.
settings_server_remote_backend_help_mobi: Use Tailscale host from desktop Agent Monitor app (Server section), for example `macbook.your-tailnet.ts.net:4732`.
settings_server_remote_backend_help_desk: This host and token are used by mobile clients and desktop remote-mode testing.
settings_server_connection_test_help: Make sure desktop app daemon is running and reachable on Tailscale, then retry this test.
settings_server_mobile_daemon_help: Start this daemon before connecting from iOS. It uses current token and listens on 0.0.0.0:<port>, matching configured host port.
settings_server_tailscale_install_help: Install Tailscale on both desktop and iOS to continue.
settings_server_tailscale_command_templa: Command template (manual fallback) for starting daemon:
settings_server_token_empty_help: Remote backend token is empty. Set one before exposing daemon access.
settings_server_scope_help_mobile: Use your own infrastructure only. On iOS, get Tailscale hostname and token from desktop Agent Monitor setup.
settings_server_scope_help_desktop: Mobile access should stay scoped to your own infrastructure (tailnet). Agent Monitor does not provide hosted backend services.
settings_server_delete_remote_message: Remove {name} from saved remotes? This only removes profile from this device.
settings_server_tcp_daemon_error: Mobile daemon is in an error state.
dictation_model_tiny_note: Fastest and smallest download. Best for quick, lower-accuracy dictation.
dictation_model_base_note: Balanced for lightweight local dictation with improved accuracy over Tiny.
dictation_model_small_note: A practical default for local dictation when you want better recognition quality.
dictation_model_medium_note: Higher accuracy, but noticeably heavier on disk and runtime resources.
dictation_model_large_v3_note: Best recognition quality, with the largest download and runtime cost.
display_subtitle: Tune visuals and audio alerts to your preferences.
display_subsection_display_subtitle: Adjust how the window renders backgrounds and effects.
display_usage_remaining_subtitle: Prefer remaining usage values over used values in the UI.
display_show_file_path_subtitle: Display source file paths when messages include file references.
display_split_panes_subtitle: Keep chat and Git diff content visible side by side when possible.
display_auto_thread_subtitle: Generate thread titles automatically from conversation context.
display_subsection_chat_subtitle: Adjust how much conversation history stays rendered in the app.
display_unlimited_chat_subtitle: Keep the full rendered chat history instead of trimming older items.
display_scrollback_help: Choose how many rendered chat items stay mounted at once.
display_reduce_transparency_subtitle: Disable translucent window effects for clarity or accessibility.
display_ui_font_help: Override the default UI font stack for app chrome and text.
display_code_font_help: Override the monospace font used for code blocks and diffs.
display_code_font_size_help: Adjust the base font size used in code blocks and diffs.
display_subsection_sounds_subtitle: Control audio cues and system notification behavior.
display_notification_sounds_subtitle: Play an in-app sound for important events.
display_system_notifications_subtitle: Send desktop notifications for important events.
display_subagent_notifications_subtitle: Send system notifications for subagent events too.
composer_subtitle: Tune follow-up behavior and editing helpers for the message composer.
composer_followup_steer_unavailable_titl: Enable steer in AI settings to use this mode.
composer_followup_help: Use {shortcut} to quickly send a follow-up while a run is active.
composer_followup_hint_subtitle: Display a hint in the composer when follow-up actions are available.
composer_followup_unavailable_help: Steer follow-ups stay disabled until the steer feature is enabled in AI settings.
composer_subsection_presets_subtitle: Apply a ready-made editing profile for the composer.
composer_preset_help: Presets update the toggles below to a practical default configuration.
composer_expand_space_subtitle: Turn triple backticks plus space into a fenced code block.
composer_expand_enter_subtitle: Turn triple backticks plus Enter into a fenced code block.
composer_language_tags_subtitle: Insert a language hint when creating code fences automatically.
composer_wrap_selection_subtitle: Wrap selected text in a code fence instead of replacing it.
composer_copy_without_fences_subtitle: Hold {modifier} when copying a code block to strip the surrounding fences.
composer_paste_multiline_subtitle: Automatically wrap pasted multiline text in a code fence when helpful.
composer_paste_code_like_subtitle: Treat code-like pasted text as code and wrap it automatically.
composer_continue_lists_subtitle: Keep list formatting going when you press Enter inside a list.
dictation_subtitle: Configure local speech-to-text input for the composer.
dictation_enable_subtitle: Allow voice dictation inside the composer.
dictation_language_help: Leave this on auto-detect unless you usually dictate in one language.
dictation_hold_key_help: Choose a modifier key to hold while dictating, or turn it off for one-tap recording.
dictation_status_ready: The selected dictation model is installed and ready.
dictation_status_missing: The selected dictation model is not installed yet.
dictation_status_error_default: The dictation model could not be prepared.
environments_subtitle: Manage shared setup commands and worktree locations for projects.
environments_global_root_help: Set the default folder used when creating new worktree agents.
environments_no_projects: Add a project to configure per-project environment settings.
environments_setup_script_help: Run this script when preparing the selected project's environment.
environments_copy_failed_unavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this environment.
environments_copy_failed_write: The setup script could not be copied to the clipboard.
environments_worktrees_folder_help: Override the default worktrees folder for this project.
settings_git_subtitle: Tune Git diff behavior and AI commit message generation.
settings_git_preload_subtitle: Fetch Git diffs eagerly to make the Git panel feel faster.
settings_git_ignore_whitespace_subtitle: Hide whitespace-only changes in Git diffs by default.
settings_git_commit_prompt_help: Use this prompt template when generating commit messages.
settings_git_commit_prompt_help_suffix: is replaced with the current diff.
settings_git_commit_model_help: Choose which model generates commit message suggestions.
home_subtitle: Orchestrate agents across your local projects.
home_latest_empty_subtitle: Start a thread to see the latest responses here.
home_usage_empty_subtitle: Run a Codex session to start tracking local usage.
about_tagline: Monitor the situation of your Codex agents
about_footer: Made with heart by Codex and Dimillian
update_ready_body: Updated successfully. Here is what is new:
update_fallback_body: Updated to v{version}. Release notes could not be loaded.
mobile_setup_subtitle: Complete this setup before using the app. Use the same connection details configured on your desktop Agent Monitor server settings.
mobile_setup_hint: Use the Tailscale host from desktop Server settings and keep the desktop daemon running.
messages_empty_existing_agent: Send a prompt to the agent.
messages_empty_new_agent: Send a prompt to start a new agent.
message_new_message_fetch_in: New message will be fetched in {seconds} seconds
prompt_panel_workspace_empty_prefix: Create one here or drop a .md file into the
prompt_panel_general_empty_prefix: Create one here or drop a .md file into
git_root_missing_repo: This workspace isn't a Git repository yet.
git_root_choose_repo: Choose a repo for this workspace.
git_pull_and_push_local_commits: Pull latest changes and push your local commits
git_no_agent_edits: No agent edits in this thread yet.
git_ask_changes_hovered_line: Ask for changes on hovered line
git_ask_changes_line: Ask for changes on this line
git_empty_pr_title: No file changes in this pull request
git_empty_pr_subtitle: The pull request loaded, but there are no diff hunks to render for this selection.
git_empty_pr_hint: Try switching to another pull request or commit from the Git panel.
git_empty_clean_subtitle: No local changes were detected for the current workspace.
git_empty_clean_hint: Make an edit, stage a file, or select a commit to inspect changes here.
composer_followup_queue_unavailable_copy: Default: Queue (Steer unavailable). Both Enter and {shortcut} will queue this message.
settings_about_subtitle: App version, build metadata, and update controls.
settings_about_auto_check_subtitle: When enabled, Agent Monitor checks for new app versions on launch.
settings_about_updates_unavailable: Updates are unavailable in this runtime.
settings_about_latest: You are on the latest version.
settings_open_apps_subtitle: Customize the Open in menu shown in the title bar and file previews.
settings_open_apps_command_help: Commands receive the selected path as the final argument.
settings_open_apps_app_help_mac: Apps open via `open -a` with optional args.
settings_open_apps_app_help_other: Apps run as an executable with optional args.
settings_shortcuts_subtitle: Customize keyboard shortcuts for file actions, composer, panels, and navigation.
settings_shortcuts_filter_help: Filter by section name, action, or default shortcut.
settings_shortcuts_group_file_subtitle: Create agents and worktrees from the keyboard.
settings_shortcuts_group_composer_subtit: Cycle between model, access, reasoning, and collaboration modes.
settings_shortcuts_press_new_default_hel: Press a new shortcut while focused. Default: {value}
settings_agents_subtitle: Configure multi-agent mode, limits, and custom agent roles.
settings_agents_builtins_help: Built-in roles from Codex are still available: `default`, `explorer`, and `worker`.
settings_agents_max_threads_subtitle: Maximum open agent threads. Valid range: `1-12`. Changes save immediately.
settings_agents_max_threads_error: Max threads must be an integer between {min} and {max}.
settings_agents_max_depth_subtitle: Maximum nested spawn depth. Valid range: `1-4`. Changes save immediately.
settings_agents_max_depth_error: Max depth must be an integer between {min} and {max}.
settings_agents_create_subtitle: Add a custom role under `[agents.<name>]` and create its config file.
settings_agents_generate_with_ai: Generate description and developer instructions with AI
settings_agents_model_loading: Loading workspace model metadata. Using fallback model defaults for now.
settings_agents_model_fallback: Using fallback model defaults until workspace model metadata is available.
settings_agents_configured_subtitle: Manage custom roles and their per-agent config files.
settings_agents_delete_prompt: Delete agent and managed config file?
settings_agents_rename_managed_file: Rename managed config file when agent name changes
clone_prompt_subtitle: Create a new working copy of "{value}".
worktree_prompt_setup_script_hint: Stored on the project (Settings -> Environments) and runs once in a dedicated terminal after each new worktree is created.
mobile_remote_workspace_subtitle: Enter directories on the connected server.
mobile_remote_workspace_hint: One path per line. Comma and semicolon separators also work. You can use `~/...`.
plan_ready_question: Start building from this plan, or describe changes to the plan.
plan_ready_placeholder: Describe what you want to change in the plan...
settings_features_subtitle: Manage stable and experimental Codex features.
settings_codex_session_default_field_sub: Used as the default for new sessions.
settings_codex_provider_subtitle: Choose the default provider for new sessions.
settings_codex_model_manual_entry_help: Uses live model suggestions when available; manual input still works.
settings_codex_providers_subtitle: Manage the fixed Airouter connection used by the app.
settings_features_pause_queue_title: Pause queued messages when a response is required
settings_features_pause_queue_subtitle: Keep queued messages paused while Codex is waiting for plan accept/changes or your answers.
settings_features_none_stable: No stable feature flags returned by Codex.
settings_features_none_experimental: No preview or under-development feature flags returned by Codex.
settings_features_connect_workspace: Connect a workspace to load Codex feature flags.
settings_projects_subtitle: Group related workspaces and reorder projects within each group.

startup_ai_setup_action_buy_api_key: No API key yet? Buy one
startup_ai_setup_hint_login: Sign in if you still need OpenAI account access, or configure an Airouter API key now.
startup_ai_setup_hint_provider: Configure an Airouter API key before starting a new chat.

main_header_open_in_terminal: Open this worktree in your terminal.
